summary: Built three reference replay bundles through the MCP VCR proxy: ref-mcp-success, ref-mcp-repeated-call, and ref-mcp-error-observation. Added a deterministic upstream MCP fixture, a generator that records through proxy record mode, packs bundles, verifies them, removes live source stores, and replays with upstream disabled. Added per-bundle READMEs and regression tests that verify bundle integrity, MCP tool catalogs, repeated-call sequence indexes, exact error observation replay, and absence of local absolute paths in public artifacts. Added a packer option to override source.repo_path for public bundles.

agentTurn.user_prompt: do Priority 2: make 2-3 reference replay bundles till pass

Added per-bundle READMEs and regression tests that verify bundle integrity, MCP tool catalogs, repeated-call sequence indexes, exact error observation replay, and absence of local absolute paths in public artifacts. tool_calls.output_summary: Generated three verified bundles: ref-mcp-success, ref-mcp-repeated-call, and ref-mcp-error-observation.

tool_calls.command: for b in ref-mcp-success ref-mcp-repeated-call ref-mcp-error-observation; do node dist/src/cli/main.js bundle verify --repo . --bundle .datalox/replay-bundles/$b --json >/dev/null || exit 1; done
tool_calls.output_summary: All three checked-in replay bundles verified through the built CLI.

tool_calls.command: npx vitest run tests/referenceBundles.test.ts tests/replayBundle.test.ts tests/mcpReplayProxy.test.ts tests/replayCanonicalDocs.test.ts tests/repoIdentity.test.ts

tool_calls.output_summary: Full suite passed: 17 test files, 105 tests.

tool_calls.output_summary: No local absolute paths found in generated replay bundles or reference docs.

file_changes.diff_summary: Reference replay bundle with one successful policy_lookup MCP call, bundled MCP tool catalog, manifest, checksums, and one tool_io_record.v1.
Reference replay bundle with two identical policy_lookup calls sharing one request_hash and sequence_index values 0 and 1.
Reference replay bundle with one validation_error MCP isError observation recorded and replayable exactly.
Deterministic MCP upstream fixture exposing policy_lookup and validation_error tools.
Generator that records through MCP proxy, packs public bundles with source.repo_path '.', verifies bundles, removes live source stores, and replays with upstream disabled.
Top-level reference bundle README with regeneration and verification commands.
Per-bundle README for the success reference bundle.
Per-bundle README for repeated-call sequence-index behavior.
Per-bundle README for exact replay of an MCP isError observation.
Added optional PackReplayBundleInput.sourceRepoPath so public bundles can replace or omit machine-local repo paths while existing callers keep the default.
Regression coverage for the three reference bundles, catalogs, sequence indexes, error observation, and local-path hygiene.
Added coverage for sourceRepoPath override in replay bundle manifests.
Cleaned and updated as active reference set plan with current status and generation workflow.
Updated pitch outline to reference the three verified bundles as concrete proof.
Linked the reference-bundle plan, pitch outline, and reference bundle examples.
Linked the reference-bundle plan and pitch outline and fixed the read path numbering.
Added the plan and pitch docs to active replay-surface stale wording checks.

verification.command: npm test && npm run check && git diff --check
verification.evidence: Generated bundles verified individually through CLI. Focused suite passed 33 tests. Full test suite passed: 17 test files, 105 tests. TypeScript no-emit and git diff --check passed.
